# Task Kickoff Template

## File Purpose
- What this file is: A reusable template for starting a task in a structured way.
- Why it exists: It standardizes task startup so humans and AI agents gather the right context before implementing changes.
- How AI agents will use it: AI agents should use this template to summarize context, confirm scope, and propose a minimal implementation plan.

## Maintenance Instructions
- When to update it: Update when the team wants a different kickoff workflow or stronger planning expectations.
- Who updates it: Humans and AI may update this template as the task workflow matures.
- How it relates to other docs: This template complements tasks.md and START_HERE.md by turning the documentation workflow into a repeatable kickoff sequence.

## Required Reading
- docs/START_HERE.md
- docs/tasks.md
- docs/design/design.md
- Only the relevant detailed design subdocuments if they exist

## Kickoff Summary
- Task ID:
- Task title:
- Current status:
- Why this task matters:
- Relevant docs reviewed:

## Current Understanding
- Expected behavior:
- Constraints:
- Unknowns:

## Clarifications
- Ask clarifying questions only if they are required to avoid incorrect implementation.

## Plan Format
- Step 1:
- Step 2:
- Step 3:

## Diff Discipline
- Prefer the smallest reviewable change.
- Avoid unrelated cleanup.
- Update tasks.md and relevant design docs after implementation.
